auth.error.username_blank:
Username cannot be blank.
Enter your username:
auth.error.username_invalid:
Invalid username. Use 3-20 characters (letters, digits, underscores).
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked:
Account '{username}' is temporarily locked. Try again in {time}.
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked_recheck:
Account locked. Try again in {time}.
Enter your username:
auth.error.account_locked_now:
Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 5 minutes.
Enter your username:
auth.prompt.create_or_exit:
Username '{username}' is not registered.
[1] Create a new character
[2] Exit
auth.error.creation_password_short:
Password must be at least 4 characters.
Choose a password:
auth.error.creation_confirm_invalid: Please enter [1] to create a character or [2] to exit.
auth.prompt.race_class:
Choose your race and class (e.g., 'Human Warrior', 'Elf Mage'):
Races: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Orc, Dragonborn, Tiefling
Classes: Warrior, Mage, Rogue, Cleric, Ranger, Paladin, Bard
auth.error.race_class_blank:
Race and class cannot be blank.
Please choose your race and class:
auth.error.race_class_format: Please specify both race and class (e.g., 'Human Warrior').
auth.error.race_invalid: Invalid race. Choose from: Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Orc, Dragonborn, Tiefling
auth.prompt.pronouns: What are your preferred pronouns? (Examples: he, she, they, ze, or custom format: subject/object/possessive)
auth.error.pronouns_blank:
Pronouns cannot be blank.
Please enter your preferred pronouns:
auth.error.pronouns_format: Invalid pronoun format. Use 'he', 'she', 'they', 'ze', or custom format 'subject/object/possessive' (e.g., 'xe/xem/xyr').
auth.prompt.description: Describe your character (optional, type 'skip' to skip):
command.move.missing_room: That path leads nowhere (room '{roomId}' is missing).
command.talk.npc_not_found: You don't see anyone called '{target}' here.
command.talk.npc_speech_failed: {npc} opens their mouth, but the words seem to get lost in the air.
command.dm.self: You can't send a DM to yourself.
command.investigate.fallback: You search every corner of the room carefully, but find nothing new.
command.investigate.discovery_default: You search carefully and discover a hidden path to the {direction}!
command.logout.confirm: Are you sure you want to log out? Type yes to confirm or no to stay.
command.logout.reconfirm: Please type yes to log out or no to stay.
command.unknown: Unknown command: '{input}'. Type 'help' for a list of commands.
command.kick.broadcast_removal: {player} has been removed from the game by {god}.
command.kick.player_message: {god} evaporates your soul. You have been kicked from the game.
command.kick.god_confirm: [god] You have kicked {player} from the game.
command.summon.broadcast_away: {player} is summoned away in a burst of light.
command.summon.broadcast_arrive: {player} appears before {god} in a burst of light.
command.teleport.target_not_found: [god] Could not find player or NPC: {target}
command.teleport.broadcast_vanish: {player} vanishes in a flash of light.
command.teleport.broadcast_appear: {player} appears in a flash of light.
command.pickup.prerequisite_fail_default: Something holds you back. You feel unworthy of taking this.
error.invalid_message_format: Invalid message format. Expected JSON: {"command":"look","args":[]} or {"input":"look around"}
error.session_state: Your session is in an unexpected state. Please reconnect.
error.game_error: An error occurred while processing your command.
error.internal: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
